prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: Four small factory machines in a row on a workbench, each with an input slot and output slot. Machine 1 "Partial": a complete card goes in, comes out with all fields now showing "?" optional badges. Machine 2 "Pick": a complete card goes in, comes out with only selected fields remaining (others dropped into a bin below). Machine 3 "Omit": a complete card goes in, specific fields are punched out and fall away, remaining fields exit. Machine 4 "Record": a key list and value type go into two slots, a complete mapped grid card comes out. Each machine has a different color and a label plate.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
